habitat: Cultivated sterile triploid; major production in Iran, also Spain, Kashmir, Greece.
traditionalUsesEn: Culinary spice and colorant; traditional mood and digestive aromatic in Persian and Mediterranean medicine.
traditionalUsesDe: Küchengewürz und Färbemittel; traditionell stimmungs- und verdauungsbezogen in persischer und mediterraner Medizin.
preparation: Threads steeped in warm liquid for food; small culinary pinches.
cautions: Very expensive—adulteration common. Extremely high doses toxic. Culinary amounts only unless supervised.
historicalNotes: Historically worth its weight in gold; hand-harvested stigmas.
